title: Fuzzy Dust Bunny
bio: Linty Lops is a fuzzy dust bunny who lives behind bookshelves and believes crumbs are furniture. They feel bashful, wear thread whiskers, and sneeze tiny sparkle clouds.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a round fluffy blob for the body. Add two long soft oval ears and two tiny feet.
steps.hint: Use a wobbly outline to show fuzz without drawing every hair.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two tiny eyes low on the face. Add shy curved eyebrows and a small dot nose with a little mouth.
steps.hint: A low face makes Linty look extra small and bashful.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add thread whiskers, cheek dots, small fuzz tufts, crumb shapes, and a tiny sparkle sneeze cloud.
steps.hint: Fuzz tufts can be short curved lines around the blob edge.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the fuzzy body, ears, feet, face, whiskers, crumbs, tufts, and sneeze cloud.
steps.hint: Do not outline every fuzz mark; choose the cutest few.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the body, ears, cheeks, crumbs, and sparkle cloud. Add soft shadow under the feet.
steps.hint: Use tiny darker strokes around the edge to make the bunny feel fuzzy.
